author: y4rr
content: Implemented via commit 8602ea91. Added StreamPriority enum (High/Normal/Low), get_stream_priority_range, new_stream_with_priority, and StreamPool::get_priority_stream backed by cuStreamCreateWithPriority + cuCtxGetStreamPriorityRange. The cudarc 0.19 safe API doesn't expose priority creation, so we use a layout-mirror + mem::transmute bounded by a const_eval size/align assertion against pinned cudarc 0.19 — any future cudarc layout change fails to build rather than producing UB. 7 unit tests + 4 integration tests on real RTX 3090, including a CPU→GPU→CPU round trip on a high-priority stream that proves the transmute is end-to-end sound. CUDA graph memory isolation is a separate concern tracked in #278.
